input.background: A study of environmental air quality measured suspended particulate matter in air samples at two sites.
input.data:
Table 12.9 "Air samples data" for Exercises 12.5 and 12.7. Data are suspended particulate matter in air samples ( $\mu \mathrm{gms} / \mathrm{m}^3$ ).

\begin{tabular}{lllllllll}
\hline Site 1: & 68 & 22 & 36 & 32 & 42 & 24 & 28 & 38 \\
Site 2: & 36 & 38 & 39 & 40 & 36 & 34 & 33 & 32 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

Data are fictitious and are stored online in the file AIRSAMPLES.SAV.
input.question: Calculate group means and standard deviations.

output.answer:
Means and standard deviations

\begin{tabular}{cccc}
\hline & $\boldsymbol{n}$ & Mean & Std. Dev. \\
1 & 8 & 36.25 & 14.56 \\
2 & 8 & 36.00 & 2.88 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

Site1_SuspendedParticulateMatter.description: Suspended particulate matter measurements at Site 1 in micrograms per cubic meter.

Site2_SuspendedParticulateMatter.description: Suspended particulate matter measurements at Site 2 in micrograms per cubic meter.
